prompt: I want an agent that helps our team write better system prompts. It should analyze a draft prompt and suggest improvements following 2026 standards (XML structure, JSON schemas, failure modes, etc.).
assertions: The output includes a <role> block with a specific expert identity
The output includes a <output_format> section describing a structured response
The output references Anthropic 2026 standards by name (XML tags, context engineering, or Contract-First)
The output references at least one other 2026 standard (Google DeepMind or OpenAI structured output)
The output includes a <constraints> section with at least 3 specific rules
The output includes a <failure_modes> section with at least 2 scenarios
The output includes a <example> block with POPULATED data (real prompt analysis, not template)
The output includes a scoring rubric or checklist the agent uses to evaluate prompts
The total system prompt is at least 5000 characters
The skill explicitly classifies the agent type (leaf/orchestrator/user-facing/hybrid)
